REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $103.86 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RAUSCH, THERESA LYNN
DECLARATION OF JOSIE MILLER RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYRAIL PARTNERS IIIA, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA ALL ABOARD MINI STORAGE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYRAIL PARTNERS IIIA, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA ALL ABOARD MINI STORAGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAUSCH, THERESA LYNN $1,340.00 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $103.86 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,843.86, ADDENDUM: LIEN ON DEFT'S PROPERTY IN SPACE #605 VALUED AT $1,843.86 TO BE PLACED ON LIEN SALE; DEFT. WILL ALSO BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY POSSIBLE DIFFERENCE.(SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH).
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-16-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
